scripts.dev:api: cd api && (python3.10 -c "import fastapi, stripe, pypdf" >/dev/null 2>&1 || python3.10 -m pip install -r requirements.txt) && python3.10 -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload
scripts.test:api: cd api && (python3.10 -c "import pytest, stripe, pypdf" >/dev/null 2>&1 || python3.10 -m pip install -r requirements.txt) && python3.10 -m pytest -q
scripts.check: npm run lint:web && npm run build:web && npm run test:api
